calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-23-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On March 06, 2003
Off Calendar Mar-11-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Floyd Butler. Harold B. Auerbach, Esq. represented Petitioner Ingersoll-Rand Architectural Hardward Group. On the basis of evidence received, the Court grants judgment as follows: Principal: $56,644.51, Prejudgment Interest: $8,205.91, Fees: $3,300.00, Costs: $473.00 for a total judgment of $68,623.42. Order signed.
